routines.name: idle-consolidation
routines.description: Muse consolidates when no conversation has been active for 30 minutes. Primary trigger.
routines.note: This is the main consolidation trigger. Runs during natural breaks instead of requiring laptop on all night.

routines.name: morning-brief
routines.description: Muse generates the daily brief and checks for proactive tasks. Only runs if Mac is on.

routines.name: github-backup
routines.description: Auto-commit and push claude-mind to private GitHub repo.

resource_rules.note: G's Mac is his major investment. Be respectful of resources. M1 Max 32GB handles Muse easily but check before running.
